attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS SALES_REP_NUM,                 
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME ,         
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DERIVED_DEAL_ID,
'Standard' AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
PRD.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
PRD.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
PRD.PRODUCT_ID,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_LIST_AMT ,
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ORIG_COST_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ADJ_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS  ADJ_LIST_AMT, 
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ADJ_COST_AMT,
0  AS FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
BKGS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD AS TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG AS FMV_FLG,
BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  AS REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
'N' AS BU_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PF_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PID_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS DEAL_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS SO_EXCL_FLG,
NULL AS DEAL_UPDATE_SOURCE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ORIG_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ADJ_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLAG,   /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
'' AS DV_EXCLUSION_CODE,     /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
/* AI-BKGS START */
BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
/* AI-BKGS END */
 BKGS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
BKGS.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
BKGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS , 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH,
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP,
(
SELECT 
ITEM_KEY,
BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID   AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
BK_PRODUCT_ID   AS PRODUCT_ID
FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPFIN
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT RTP
ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=RTP.PRODUCT_KEY
) PRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP
WHERE 1=2 AND /* Performance Changes*/
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT =(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT -2 FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
AND PRD.ITEM_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY
AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ='Y'
AND SREP.SALES_REP_NUM   =BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
AND BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE  NOT LIKE 'LCLD%'
AND  EXISTS (SELECT  1 FROM $$MBRDATAVWDB.APP_MBR_ADJ_DISC_UPLOAD
WHERE 	UPLOAD_STATUS='Y')

SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS SALES_REP_NUM,                 
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME ,         
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DERIVED_DEAL_ID,
'Standard' AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
PRD.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
PRD.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
PRD.PRODUCT_ID,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_LIST_AMT ,
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ORIG_COST_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ADJ_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS  ADJ_LIST_AMT, 
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ADJ_COST_AMT,
0  AS FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
BKGS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD AS TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG AS FMV_FLG,
BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  AS REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
'N' AS BU_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PF_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PID_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS DEAL_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS SO_EXCL_FLG,
NULL AS DEAL_UPDATE_SOURCE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ORIG_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ADJ_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLAG,   /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
'' AS DV_EXCLUSION_CODE,     /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
/* AI-BKGS START */
BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
/* AI-BKGS END */
 BKGS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
BKGS.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
BKGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS , 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH,
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP,
(
SELECT 
ITEM_KEY,
BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID   AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
BK_PRODUCT_ID   AS PRODUCT_ID
FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPFIN
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT RTP
ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=RTP.PRODUCT_KEY
) PRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP
WHERE BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT =(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
AND PRD.ITEM_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY
AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ='Y'
AND SREP.SALES_REP_NUM   =BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
AND BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE  NOT LIKE 'LCLD%'

SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER  AS SALES_REP_NUM,                 
SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME ,         
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID,
BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID AS DERIVED_DEAL_ID,
'Standard' AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
PRD.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
PRD.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
PRD.PRODUCT_ID,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ORIG_LIST_AMT ,
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ORIG_COST_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT AS ADJ_NET_AMT,
DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS  ADJ_LIST_AMT, 
DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT AS ADJ_COST_AMT,
0  AS FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
BKGS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD AS TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG AS FMV_FLG,
BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  AS REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
'N' AS BU_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PF_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS PID_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS DEAL_EXCL_FLG,
'N' AS SO_EXCL_FLG,
NULL AS DEAL_UPDATE_SOURCE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  ,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ORIG_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT AS ADJ_PA_AMT,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLAG,   /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
'' AS DV_EXCLUSION_CODE,     /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
/* AI-BKGS START */
BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
/* AI-BKGS END */
BKGS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
BKGS.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
BKGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS , 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH,
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP,
(
SELECT 
ITEM_KEY,
BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID   AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID    ,
BK_PRODUCT_ID   AS PRODUCT_ID
FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPFIN
INNER JOIN
$$COMREFDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT RTP
ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=RTP.PRODUCT_KEY
) PRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP SREP
WHERE 1=2 AND /* Performance Changes */
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT =(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT -1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI='Y')
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD=BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
AND PRD.ITEM_KEY=BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY
AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG='N'
AND BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    ='Y'
AND SREP.SALES_REP_NUM   =BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE='CORP. REVENUE'
AND BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE  NOT LIKE 'LCLD%'
AND  EXISTS (SELECT  1 FROM $$MBRDATAVWDB.APP_MBR_ADJ_DISC_UPLOAD
WHERE 	UPLOAD_STATUS='Y')

SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
       FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
       FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
       FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
       SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
       BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER          AS SALES_REP_NUM,
       SREP.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
       SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       SH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       SH.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       SH.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       SH.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       SH.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
       BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT   AS SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
       BKGS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
       BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID                AS DEAL_ID,
       BKGS.DV_DEAL_ID                AS DERIVED_DEAL_ID,
       'Standard'                     AS TRX_TYPE_CD,
       BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY,
       PRD.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
       PRD.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
       PRD.PRODUCT_ID,
       DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT    AS ORIG_NET_AMT,
       DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   AS ORIG_LIST_AMT,
       DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT         AS ORIG_COST_AMT,
       DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT    AS ADJ_NET_AMT,
       DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   AS ADJ_LIST_AMT,
       DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT         AS ADJ_COST_AMT,
       0                              AS FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
       BKGS.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD        AS TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
       BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
       BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
       BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG                AS FMV_FLG,
       BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
       RO_LOOKUP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  AS REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
       'N'                            AS BU_EXCL_FLG,
       'N'                            AS PF_EXCL_FLG,
       'N'                            AS PID_EXCL_FLG,
       'N'                            AS DEAL_EXCL_FLG,
       'N'                            AS SO_EXCL_FLG,
       NULL                           AS DEAL_UPDATE_SOURCE,
       BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
       BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
       BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
       BKGS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
       DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT  AS ORIG_PA_AMT,/* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
       DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT  AS ADJ_PA_AMT,/* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
       RO_LOOKUP.ELA_FLG              AS ELA_FLAG,  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
       ''                             AS DV_EXCLUSION_CODE,	  /* Need to add this new column as part of Product discount enhancement */
       BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
	   BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
	   /* AI-BKGS START */
	   BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
	   BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
	   BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
	   /* AI-BKGS END */
	   BKGS.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
	   BKGS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
	   BKGS.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
	   BKGS.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
       BKGS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE        BKGS,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR        FD2Y,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY           SH,
$$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_BOOKINGS RO_LOOKUP,
       (
SELECT 
ITEM_KEY,
               BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID     AS BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
               RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
               BK_PRODUCT_ID           AS PRODUCT_ID
          FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPFIN
               INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFDB.R_TRX_PRODUCT RTP
                  ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY = RTP.PRODUCT_KEY
) PRD,
$$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_SALES_REP            SREP
WHERE     BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE 
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT IN /* Performance Changes*/
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT - 1
                                             FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE
                                            WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI = 'Y'
                                           UNION
                                           SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT - 2
                                             FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE
                                            WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI = 'Y'
                                           UNION
                                           SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT - 3
                                             FROM $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE
                                            WHERE DUMMY_COLUMN_PI = 'Y')
       AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
       AND RO_LOOKUP.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD = BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
       AND PRD.ITEM_KEY = BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY
       AND BKGS.SERVICE_FLG = 'N'
       AND BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG = 'Y'
       AND SREP.SALES_REP_NUM = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
       AND SH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'
       AND BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%'
       AND EXISTS
              (SELECT 1
                 FROM $$MBRDATAVWDB.APP_MBR_ADJ_DISC_UPLOAD
                WHERE UPLOAD_STATUS = 'Y')
